type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【赫尔基德最早的个人记录是在海德拉银行风控部的工作记录。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「一切的风险，都会有与之相配的利益。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这是赫尔基德教给每个加入海德拉银行风控部新人的第一件事。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"海德拉银行的传奇风控人，以最快速度升入银行高层的天才，每个出身普通的银行职员向往的偶像··这是大多数海德拉银行员工对赫尔基德的第一印象。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"最初，赫尔基德只是一个风控部普通职员，每天的工作就是使用各种手段收集情报和数据、进行分析并为那些有钱人提出各种投资建议和风险提示。在分析情报和数据上，赫尔基德有着超乎常人的天赋，总能敏锐地发现其中暗藏的玄机。赫尔基德只需要几个关键的数据，就能把参与其中的那些企业与幕后主使人的想法猜得一清二楚，因此，他很快就在这份岗位上取得了惊人的成绩。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那时候，人们都认为，赫尔基德会成为海德拉银行的下一任风控部主管。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"然而，只有赫尔基德自己知道，工作上的成功并不能给他任何成就感。他早就摸透了那些占据了精英阶层顶端的、有钱人们的心思一一用手里的钱，赚更多的钱，循环往复，永不改变。那些人的思想迂腐不堪，他们的眼界永远只限于那些被自己拢入怀中的金币，而永远也看不到远方无限的可能性。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"赫尔基德对这样停滞不前的世界感到厌倦和怜悯，他渴求变化与革新。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【赫尔基德正在筹谋一个风险与收益同样巨大的计划。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你会成为撬动整个伊瑟的几个关键点之一。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"赫尔基德还记得，当他向自己真正的「上级」汇报对海德拉银行的渗透进度时，那个人对自己的评价。他还能回想起那一刻，快意从他心底涌出，顺着他的脊椎冲向四肢百骸，让他的身躯兴奋地战栗着，仿佛一个天翻地覆的崭新伊瑟已经触手可及。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这将是我无上的荣耀。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"直到「上级」走远，他才从一直维持着的鞠躬姿势中直起身。他的心情无比畅快，但他的表情仍旧维持着平静。他知道，他真正的「同伴们」已经在着手准备一天精妙的计划，他也必须已经开始筹谋下一步的行动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他需要拉拢一些能被自己所利用的人，而他的心里已经有了人选。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【赫尔基德找到了一个绝佳的合作者。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你是说，你会为我的研究提供资金？从场地到设备，甚至是实验材料？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"青灰色皮肤的少年睁大了眼睛，直勾勾地盯着赫尔基德，他的语气半信半疑，但却难掩目光中热切的期待。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你想从我这里得到什么？知识？技术？还是学术成果？无所谓，论文一作也好，技术专利也罢，只要让我亲自做实验，剩下的，你想要什么都可以。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不，那些东西我都不要。我需要的，是你的才智，RC-77。 」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"赫尔基德将一张海德拉银行的黑卡放在桌上，缓缓推向RC-77。RC-77当然知道这意味着什么，想要拥有海德拉银行的黑卡，就至少要有几千万伊瑟币的储蓄。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这张卡里的伊瑟币应该足够你用几年的。并且，这些只不过是定金，你想研究什么都行，但要遵守我的要求。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你说。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「一段时间后，会有一个极为重要的研究项目，我需要你去研究它，严格保密，并且提供一切成果。有任何问题吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不……当然没有！这简直，太棒了！」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"护盾，免疫"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 115|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性3攻击加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"pve中暂无刚需就业，pvp被拉姆克制，虽然被增强过，但玩法有待开发"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+8攻势+6极影强袭"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"万魔法典"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_283/h_300/50364/842288/2025/7/18/326826.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"GbttiyVcs2RwWdfj","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
